headline: IBM to Appoint Omnicom Media as Global Media Agency of Record
summary: Omnicom Media, an Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) Connected Capability, today announced it will be named global media agency of record for IBM following a competitive review. The appointment includes media planning and buying responsibilities across the Americas, EMEA, Japan and APAC regions.

headline: What to Expect From Omnicom’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Omnicom is expected to report its second-quarter results soon, and analysts forecast a double-digit growth in earnings per share.
